## Checklist

- [ ] Build passes (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Types check (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Accessibility considered (APCA AAA 3.0 contrast, keyboard navigation)
